ABOUT ME

with a Vision

I am a motivated B.Tech CSE (AI & ML) student at Parul University with a strong foundation in full-stack web development and data structures. I specialize in building end-to-end MERN stack applications and solving complex algorithmic problems.

As a certified AWS Cloud Practitioner, I am always ready to learn, innovate, and contribute to real-world software engineering solutions.
